arabic: عن أبي هريرة رضي الله عنه أن رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم‏:‏ نهى عن الخصر في الصلاة‏.‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

english.narrator: Abu Hurairah (May Allah be pleased with him) said:
english.text: We are prohibited from placing the hand on the side during As-Salat (the prayer)..

chapter.english: The Book of the Prohibited actions
